---
title: "PolyITAN-1 Analysis"
author: "Ada Lazuli"
date: "2026-04-26"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Front Matter

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(reactable)
library(qqplotr)
df <- read.csv("filtered.csv")
df$log_transmission_rate <- log1p(df$transmission_rate)
reactable(df)
```

## Model Creation

```{r}
# The * symbol includes main effects AND interactions
model <- aov(log_transmission_rate ~ ground_lit * sat_lit * elevation_class + Station, data = df)

# View the results
summary(model)
```

## Verification of Assumptions 

```{r}
length(table(df$Station))
```
## ANOVA
